artifact: ARCANOS Phase 2E PostgreSQL 18 verifier failure baseline
rootCauses: PostgreSQL name-array catalog values were decoded as PostgreSQL array-literal strings while both verifiers expected JavaScript arrays.
The CHECK canonicalizer retained a redundant singleton AND node after collapsing PostgreSQL 18 expanded bounds into BETWEEN semantics.
Partial-index definition normalization removed whitespace around WHERE while the comparator depended on that whitespace.
Ledger invalidity and missing appliedAt were fail-closed consequences of the structural false negatives.
controlsThatPassed: checksum-mismatch refusal before additional catalog mutation
compatibilityLimitation: The prior Phase 2D.1 check exercised generated Prisma scalar reads only; it did not establish bounded legacy repository or application startup compatibility.
